label: Mech weight class
description: Defines a weight class for mechanoids (Light, Medium, Heavy, UltraHeavy), controlling resurrection eligibility.

canResurrect.label: Can resurrect
canResurrect.description: Whether mechanoids of this weight class can be resurrected after death. Defaults to true; UltraHeavy sets this to false.

basic-mech-weight-class.label: Basic mech weight class
basic-mech-weight-class.description: Minimal mech weight class with a defName and label.
